THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CIRILO, FERNANDO AKA KEVIN BRUSSEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 519 ELLIS STREET, #407, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $300.00 RENT, $150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $116.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $566.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-05-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, THE $300 WAS PAID TO PLAINTIFF IN OPEN COURT ON 6/17/98; THE BALANCE OF $266 SHALL BE PAID IN 6 MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
